responsibility: Qualify inbound interest, map client request to package, collect requirements, assign order ID, and route to delivery team
Design automation architecture, choose toolchain, map APIs, define triggers and outputs, and reduce risk of broken automations
Build workflows in Zapier/Make/n8n, connect apps, test retries, and document credentials and limits
Write and tune prompts, classify intents, set escalation rules, and keep outputs consistent across channels
Write and localize customer-facing copy for replies, sequences, confirmations, and notifications
Design lead magnets, acquisition channels, cold outreach sequences, and conversion experiments
Build automated campaigns: nurture, re-engagement, onboarding, post-purchase updates
Run delivery cadence, milestones, handoffs, risk log, and client reporting
Verify triggers, edge cases, error paths, and confirm automation behavior before delivery
Propose packaging and pricing, estimate resource usage, and guard margin against runaway usage
Maintain reliability alerts, SLA tracking, and issue triage when automation fails
